title: bridelia scleroneura f. habroneura
intro: Bridelia scleroneura f. habroneura, also known as the Indian bitter or bitter calumba, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to various parts of Asia and Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Bridelia scleroneura f. habroneura is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
